raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I was charged {$32.00} by TEMU.COM for a jacket. However, I never received the package until now. I contacted XXXX customer service. They refuse to figure out my issue. I submitted a dispute to my American Express credit card company. American Express said the XXXX has delivered my package. Let me call XXXX, then denied my dispute. XXXX refuse to help me because I am not the sender. Also, I can not get the tracking information according to the tracking number provided by XXXX. In fact, I never received the package.
